title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Pugmarks India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Pugmarks India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Pugmarks India International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Reservation Manager based out of Pimpri-Chinchwad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Pugmarks India International Enterprises:
Pugmarks India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pugmarks India International Enterprises!
